name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-29
title: Housekeeping wave 1: sync Inv 34/35 for PR #151 + add dispatch-bypass wrapper + dead-code cleanup + tombstone consolidation
description:
Bundled housekeeping items for contract feature.

PRIMARY (depends-on for tdd-subagent BUG-57):
(M2) Inv 34 + Inv 35 in spec.md don't reflect PR #151's bypass-permissions-active addition. Add 'bypass-permissions-active (red, icon ALERT)' to Inv 34 required-id list; add 'bypass_permissions_active() -> str' to Inv 35 wrapper enumeration. __all__ in rabbit_print.py already has it; spec lags.

(NEW for BUG-57 dependency) Add a NEW message-id 'dispatch-bypass-note' to rabbit-print-messages.json registry with icon (any appropriate non-conflicting) + color yellow (new color — see additional note below) + text body matching the current dispatch-tdd-subagent.py bypass preamble note. Add a bypass_note() (or named-wrapper) function to rabbit_print.py. This wrapper will be consumed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py to replace its inline ANSI/brand string per BUG-57 resolution.

Color note: current rabbit-print-messages.json has only green and red colors registered. The bypass preamble note uses yellow (\x1b[33m). Add yellow to the colors palette: { 'ansi': '\\u001b[33m', 'reset': '\\u001b[0m' }. Update Inv 34/related schemas accordingly. The colors schema enum at rabbit-print.schema.json line 61 will need to add 'yellow' (or relax the enum — see LOW F4 below).

LOW BACKLOG items (file together):
(F2) rabbit_print.py docstring still cites 'tdd-subagent scripts' as importer. Per Inv 36 the canonical producer is tdd-state-machine/tdd-step.py. Update docstring.
(F3) lib/checks.py line 50-52 dead _get_repo_root backwards-compat alias. Delete.
(F4) rabbit-print.schema.json colors enum {green,red} hardcoded while colors map allows additionalProperties. Inconsistent. Pick one: relax enum (preferred — supports new colors like yellow for BUG-57) OR tighten colors map. We'll relax + add yellow.
(F5) feature.json.schema.json optional bugs_root field is dead since item storage moved to rabbit-file. Delete.
(F6) test-dead-relink-tests-deleted.py + test-backlog-27-retirements.py + test-bug-41-cleanup.py — 360 LOC of one-shot 'file stays deleted' asserts. Consolidate into one slim 'retired-artifacts-stay-retired.py' or delete (the assertions can only regress via deliberate revival; coverage exists elsewhere).
(F7) test-bug-fixes-cycle.py is 248 LOC, ~5/16 entries are 'moot, deleted' stubs. Either retire (assertions covered by per-concern tests) or strip moot entries.
(F8) spec.md has ~9 'removed in CONTRACT-BACKLOG-X' tombstone invariants (~20% of 44 total). Renumber and move tombstone log to CHANGELOG.

Acceptance: PR #151 reflected in spec; new bypass-note wrapper available for tdd-subagent BUG-57 fix; dead aliases/schema fields/duplicate tests removed; tombstone invariants consolidated.

NOTE: this backlog must land BEFORE the tdd-subagent BUG-57/BUG-58 cycle since H3 fix depends on the new wrapper.
